---
title: "Aula 3 Git e GitHub"
author: "Luiz Fernando Bevilacqua"
date: "2026-03-25"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.


luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)
$ git checkout -b experimento
Switched to a new branch 'experimento'

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (experimento)
$ git checkout main
Already on 'main'
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'.

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)
$ git merge experimento
Updating faa1316..183f7e5
Fast-forward
 analise.R | 3 +--
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 2 deletions(-)

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)
$ git push origin main^C

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)
$

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)
$ git push origin main
Enumerating objects: 5, done.
Counting objects: 100% (5/5), done.
Delta compression using up to 8 threads
Compressing objects: 100% (2/2), done.
Writing objects: 100% (3/3), 319 bytes | 79.00 KiB/s, done.
Total 3 (delta 0), reused 0 (delta 0), pack-reused 0 (from 0)
To https://github.com/luizfernandobevilacqua-max/exercicio-stat-basica.git
   faa1316..183f7e5  main -> main

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)
$ git worktree add ../exercicio-worktree experimento
Preparing worktree (checking out 'experimento')
HEAD is now at 183f7e5 "Teste com histograma"

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)
$ git add analise.R

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)
$ git commit -m "Alteração via worktree"
On branch main
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'.

Untracked files:
  (use "git add <file>..." to include in what will be committed)
        .gitignore
        exercicio-stat-basica.Rproj

nothing added to commit but untracked files present (use "git add" to track)

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)
$ cd ../exercicio-worktree

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-worktree (experimento)
$ git add analise.R

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-worktree (experimento)
$ git commit -m "Alteração feita dentro da worktree"
[experimento 48eb82d] Alteração feita dentro da worktree
 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+)

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-worktree (experimento)
$ cd ../exercicio-stat-basica

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)
$ git worktree remove ../exercicio-worktree

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)
$ git log --oneline --graph --all
* 48eb82d (experimento) Alteração feita dentro da worktree
* 183f7e5 (HEAD -> main, origin/main, origin/HEAD) "Teste com histograma"
* faa1316 "Adiciona sumário estatístico"
* a9a5e1b "Adiciona sumário estatístico"
* 7329247 "Meu primeiro script"
* abe99ac Initial commit

luizf@LAPTOP-3JLDNRED MINGW64 ~/OneDrive/Documentos/Aula-M-todos-Quantitativos/Aula3/exercicio-stat-basica (main)
$
